name: worktrunk
description: Codex packaging of Worktrunk guidance for git worktree management and parallel AI agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Manage git worktrees for parallel agent workflows
interface.longDescription: Codex-native packaging of Worktrunk's setup, commit generation, and multi-worktree workflow guidance, with a reference hook configuration for environments where experimental Codex hooks are confirmed to load manually.
